title: festuca ovina subsp. duriuscula
intro: Festuca ovina subsp. duriuscula is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, commonly known as small fescue. This perennial grass is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Festuca ovina subsp. duriuscula include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Festuca ovina subsp. duriuscula can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
